usp: Redefining the threshold of design through light-maximizing systems and minimalist frames that provide unparalleled visual clarity for luxury residences.
industry: Bespoke Glazing Solutions & In-House Aluminium Manufacturing
usp: From our local Edinburgh workshop to your home. We manufacture our own precision aluminium systems and supply & fit premium uPVC, timber, and specialist structural glazing for every architectural requirement.
heroSubtext: Alumise provides the complete architectural envelope. Whether it's a luxury residential extension featuring our bespoke bi-folds and roof lanterns, or high-performance timber and uPVC windows, we manufacture, supply, and fit every detail—down to the custom aluminium trims.

services.title: Bespoke Bi-Folds & Sliding Doors
services.description: Manufactured in-house to your exact specifications. Our slimline aluminium systems maximise light and space, creating seamless transitions for luxury homes and commercial spaces alike.

services.title: Roof Lights & Architectural Lanterns
services.description: Illuminate your living space from above. We offer a full range of high-performance roof lanterns and flat skylights, engineered for elite thermal efficiency and stunning visual impact.

services.title: Timber & uPVC Glazing Systems
services.description: True material flexibility. Beyond our aluminium manufacturing, we supply and fit premium timber and high-performance uPVC glazing to suit any heritage renovation or modern build.

services.title: Aluminium Trims & Custom Detailing
services.description: The finishing touch. We fabricate custom aluminium trims and architectural detailing in-house, ensuring a flawless, precision-engineered finish for every glazing installation.

address: Unit 14, Prince Regent Street, Port of Leith, Edinburgh, EH6 4AP
